'''Bortras''' was a tranquil world of lush valleys and fertile landscapes in the [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was known as the home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
